title: Butterfly Stainless Steel Manual Can Opener, Tin Openers Heavy Duty for Arthritis Hands, Smooth Edge Food-Safe, Easy Grip, Safe Jar Opener, Effortless Kitchen Gadgets, Camping
features: Food-Safe Stainless-Steel Blade: Ensure safety with a food-grade stainless steel blade, free from harmful chemicals, rust, or breakage for years of use.
Ultra-Sharp Cutting Technology: The closely combined gear and sharp blade guarantee quick, efficient can opening, leaving a flat and smooth cover edge without the risk of self-harm.

User-Friendly Design: Featuring a non-slip handle with an ergonomic large sturdy knob, our can opener allows easy turning without finger strain—ideal for women and seniors, ensuring safe and effortless can cutting.

Versatile 3-in-1 Functionality: Beyond can opening, our manual opener lifts lids and opens bottles, making it a versatile tool for home kitchens, restaurants, camping, barbecue parties, and outdoor picnics.
Easy Cleaning and Storage: Simplify maintenance with easy hand washing using mild detergent and water; dry with a cloth. The added hanging hole in the handle ensures convenient storage.
